description: Assigns properties to pile elements in the range. The properties consist of constitutive model properties, beam-type properties, coupling-spring properties and rockbolt properties. The constitutive model property names are primary keywords, but are not included in the list above. The following properties are available, with the constitutive model properties listed first.

6.0.description: Assign the specified property to all elements in the range.

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-normal
keywords.description: normal coupling spring cohesive strength, cn

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-shear
keywords.description: shear coupling spring cohesive strength, cs

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating cohesion of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: coupling-confining-flag
keywords.description: flag to activate incremental confining stress logic (default: off)

keywords.name: coupling-confining-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating effective confining stress factor to deviatoric stress

keywords.name: coupling-friction-normal
keywords.description: normal coupling spring friction angle, fn

keywords.name: coupling-friction-shear
keywords.description: shear coupling spring friction angle, fs

keywords.name: coupling-friction-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating friction angle of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: coupling-gap-normal
keywords.description: normal coupling spring gap-use flag, g

keywords.name: moi-y
keywords.description: second moment with respect to local y-axis, Iy

keywords.name: moi-z
keywords.description: second moment with respect to local z-axis, Iz

keywords.name: rockbolt-flag
keywords.description: flag to activate rockbolt logic (default: off)

7.0.description: Assign the specified property to all elements in the range.

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating cohesion of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: coupling-confining-flag
keywords.description: flag to activate incremental confining stress logic (default: off)

keywords.name: coupling-confining-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating effective confining stress factor to deviatoric stress

keywords.name: coupling-friction-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating friction angle of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: moi-y
keywords.description: second moment with respect to local \(y\)-axis, \(I_y\)

keywords.name: moi-z
keywords.description: second moment with respect to local \(z\)-axis, \(I_z\)

keywords.name: plastic-moment-y
keywords.description: plastic moment about the local Y direction, \(M_y^P\)

keywords.name: plastic-moment-z
keywords.description: plastic moment about the local Z direction, \(M_z^P\)

keywords.name: rockbolt-flag
keywords.description: flag to activate rockbolt logic (default: off)

keywords.name: tensile-failure-strain
keywords.description: tensile failure strain (non-dimensional, only active if rockbolt-flag is on)

keywords.name: yield-compression
keywords.description: axial compressive yield strength (force unit, only active if rockbolt-flag is on)

keywords.name: yield-tension
keywords.description: axial tensile yield strength (force unit, only active if rockbolt-flag is on)

keywords.name: direction-y
keywords.description: direction-y vector whose projection onto the element cross-section defines the \(y\) -axis of the element coordinate system

keywords.name: moi-y
keywords.description: moment of inertia with respect to element \(y\) -axis

keywords.name: moi-z
keywords.description: moment of inertia with respect to element \(z\) -axis

keywords.name: plastic-moment
keywords.description: plastic moment capacity in Y and Z

keywords.name: plastic-shear
keywords.description: plastic shear capacity in Y and Z

keywords.name: shear-coefficient-y
keywords.description: shear coefficient for transverse shear deformation in the \(y\) -direction (Timoshenko beam only)

keywords.name: shear-coefficient-z
keywords.description: shear coefficient for transverse shear deformation in the \(z\) -direction (Timoshenko beam only)

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-normal
keywords.description: normal coupling spring cohesion per unit length

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-shear
keywords.description: shear coupling spring cohesion per unit length

keywords.name: coupling-cohesion-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating cohesion of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: coupling-confining-flag
keywords.description: flag to activate incremental confining stress logic

keywords.name: coupling-confining-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating effective confining stress factor to deviatoric stress

keywords.name: coupling-friction-table
keywords.description: name of the table relating friction angle of shear coupling spring to relative shear displacement

keywords.name: tensile-failure-strain
keywords.description: tensile failure strain (non-dimensional, only active if rockbolt-flag is on )

keywords.name: yield-compression
keywords.description: axial compressive yield strength (force unit, only active if rockbolt-flag is on )

keywords.name: yield-tension
keywords.description: axial tensile yield strength (force unit, only active if rockbolt-flag is on )
